TrendVault Daily Trend Scan — 2026-05-21

Scanned 11 trending products via CloakBrowser (ExplodingTopics.com + evergreen patterns).

Top 3 Trends:
1. 🎙️ Podcast Microphone — 60.5K search vol, +1150% growth. Highest volume product overall. Creator economy driving demand.
2. 💊 GLP-1 Supplement — 49.5K search vol, +925% growth. 'Natural Ozempic' trend still surging. Summer weight loss season arriving.
3. 🧴 PDRN Cream — 40.5K search vol, +5900% growth. Korean regenerative skincare leading beauty. Sustained for third consecutive week.

Notable: PDRN Toner volume increased 2.4K→2.9K (+21%) week-over-week — companion products riding the PDRN wave.

Categories: gadgets: 4, fitness: 2, beauty: 2, pets: 2, home: 1

Sources: ExplodingTopics.com (CloakBrowser). Amazon Movers & Shakers blocked. Google Trends Shopping timed out via Smartproxy.
